free_text: Experimental study of the energy dependence of the
12C(alpha,alpha1gamma4.44) double differential
reaction cross section at the region Ealpha=16-25 MeV
Preprint of Inst.of Nucl.
Phys. of Moscow State Univ.
U-120 cyclotron
Aluminium foils were used as energy
degraders.
Scattered alpha-particles were registered by six
silicon semiconductor detectors 40 to 200 mu-m thick
with an angular resolution of +-2 degrees.
Gamma-ray photons were registered by four
standard scintillation counters of the BDEG-23 type
containing NaJ(Tl)) crystals with angular resolutions
of + -13 degrees.
The target consisted of carbon films 0.8-1.2 mg/cm2
thick and polystyrene films 0.4-0.6 mg/cm2 thick.
Error of target thickness definition
Fig.10 from Preprint of Inst.of Nucl.
Phys. of Moscow State Univ.
No source of uncertainty is given
